title: No, No, Nanette
writer: Frank Mandel, Otto A. Harbach, Vincent Youmans
actors: Anna Neagle, Richard Carlson, Victor Mature
plot: Perky young Nanette attempts to save the marriage of her uncle and aunt by untangling Uncle Jimmy from several innocent but ensnaring flirtations. Attempting one such unentanglement, Nanette enlists the help of theatrical producer...
